name: Shengyuan Environmental Protection Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shengyuan Environmental Protection Co.,Ltd. engages in the waste incineration power generation, sewage treatment, etc. in China. The company is involved in the collection, transportation, and terminal treatment of domestic garbage. It has five sewage treatment plants and one landfill leachate treatment station. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Xiamen, China.
